name: Lead Source Hygiene Report
description: Audit the data quality underlying every attribution number. Trust score, issue counts, top offenders, concrete examples, so you know exactly where the attribution layer is solid and where to invest in fixing.
alsoSurfaces: How trustworthy is the attribution data we report on?
Where are pixels failing or UTM tags inconsistent across campaigns?
Where does identity stitching across CRM and MAP break?
Which campaigns and owners are causing the most hygiene issues?
beforeWeRun: Audit scope: comprehensive, or narrow to one category (UTM / lead source / stitching / mapping / source agreement)?

whatYoullGet.name: Trust score
whatYoullGet.desc: Big-number KPI with trend indicator and color band (green ≥85, amber 60–84, red <60).

whatYoullGet.name: Issue summary
whatYoullGet.desc: Per-category issue counts and severity, color-coded.

whatYoullGet.name: Coverage breakdown
whatYoullGet.desc: Per-category coverage rates trended over the prior 4 audit runs.

whatYoullGet.name: Top offenders
whatYoullGet.desc: Per-category sortable tables: campaigns, owners, and sources causing the most issues.

whatYoullGet.name: Issue examples
whatYoullGet.desc: Expandable cards showing concrete examples of each issue type, fixable or escalatable.

callout: 3 quick inputs, then Sage builds your hygiene audit in ~8 min.
